'''''Cargo-Go''''' was a [[Leafar]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] once protected by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to gain its support.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
